prompt: Create a serene anime-style vertical portrait of Ami, shown from the chest up in a three-quarter back view, standing outdoors under a vivid blue summer sky with large soft white cumulus clouds. The character has short tousled pale blonde bobbed hair with fine windblown strands, detailed highlights, and a softly glowing rim light from the sun. Their face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in a warm skin-tone beige, covering the entire facial area while leaving the hair, ear, neck, and silhouette visible. They wear an oversized light sky blue T-shirt with loose folds and a white butterfly-wing motif printed across the upper back, resembling delicate angel or butterfly wings. Use clean high-quality Japanese anime illustration style, crisp linework, soft cel shading, airy bright lighting, gentle pastel color palette, realistic fabric creases, and a calm dreamy mood. Composition should be portrait orientation, close framing, character slightly left of center, looking toward the right side of the image, with no text, no watermark, and no extra characters.
